description: Reference extraction, tier classification, library matching, and LinkedRefs document pipeline for ABFM ITE question bank references.

subfolders.01_source: Source reference lists and gold list PDFs (numbered 1-21)
subfolders.02_working: Working files — tier CSVs, question-ref pairs, match reports
subfolders.04_outputs: Matcher outputs, ingested JSONs, manifest, LinkedRefs docs
subfolders.05_scripts: All pipeline scripts — matcher, crosswalk builder, doc generator

excluded_from_migration.IDSA_periprosthetic_joint: 4-page AAOS summary stub — not full manuscript. Flagged for re-acquisition.
excluded_from_migration.SLUHN_culture_guidelines: Excluded by user — not part of curriculum scope.

key_scripts.match_tiers_to_library.py: 05_scripts/ — main matcher, reads library PDFs + priority refs
key_scripts.migrate_to_unified.py: guideline_extractor_v2/ — migrates extracted JSONs to ingested/json/
key_scripts.apply_overrides.py: 05_scripts/linked_refs_build/ — applies manual pins + nulls to crosswalk_final.csv

next_steps: Re-acquire IDSA_periprosthetic_joint.pdf — current file is 4-page stub, need full AAOS manuscript
Acquire jacc_pulm batch — next priority acquisition folder
Re-run crosswalk pipeline after each new batch to expand LinkedRefs
Consider re-running match_tiers_to_library.py after id_renal_gi_hep integration to update confirmed_present count
